documentation:
# hnswlib-prebuilt

Prebuilt wheels for [hnswlib](https://github.com/nmslib/hnswlib).

Originally created by Yury Malkov and the hnswlib contributors: https://github.com/nmslib/hnswlib

This package provides precompiled binaries for easy installation on:
- Linux (x86_64, aarch64)
- macOS (x86_64, arm64)
- Windows (x86_64) 

Supports Python 3.10+

Apache License 2.0
